topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: Align product and user documentation with shipped categorizer: refresh stale docs/CODEBASE_ANALYSIS.md (model, mapping layers, API v1.1.0), make README feature coverage report green under README_FEATURE_COVERAGE_ENFORCE=1, add docs/user-guides/US-0002.md, and reconcile vision.md pipeline narrative with README.

docs/CODEBASE_ANALYSIS.md (primary drift target), README.md feature sections and pipeline diagram, docs/product/vision.md (post-US-0001 test harness + pipeline consistency), docs/user-guides/US-0002.md (new), scripts/validate_readme_feature_coverage.py report output, docs/engineering/runbook.md TEST_COMMAND cross-check, docs/developer/README.md if project README gate surfaces gaps.

Documentation-only vertical slice — no runtime or API contract changes. scope_out: marketing site and translations. README_FEATURE_COVERAGE_ENFORCE=1 and PROJECT_README_ENFORCE=1 may block release until gaps closed. US-0001 test harness shipped (S0003) — CODEBASE_ANALYSIS and vision must not contradict runbook TEST_COMMAND. Prior plan_area documentation mapped to US-0002 in product backfill.
topic_coverage.delegation_rationale: Product backfill (2026-06-12) established US-0002 boundaries and deferred doc-debt note in R-0003; drain-advance after US-0001/S0003 confirms documentation plan area still maps to this story.

topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: AC-1: CODEBASE_ANALYSIS reflects gpt-4o-mini, full mapping-layer pipeline, API v1.1.0. AC-2: validate_readme_feature_coverage.py --report exits 0. AC-3: US-0002 user guide with Purpose/Prerequisites/Usage/Example/Limitations/Troubleshooting. AC-4: vision and README categorization pipeline descriptions consistent.

Done when all US-0002 acceptance rows pass: analysis doc current, README coverage gate green, operator user guide published at docs/user-guides/US-0002.md, and vision/README pipeline language aligned — no code changes required.

decomposition.rationale: Documentation alignment remains one operator-facing vertical slice: stale analysis refresh, README gate, user guide, and vision consistency ship together.
decomposition.alternative_considered: Split CODEBASE_ANALYSIS refresh vs README/user-guide work — rejected; partial delivery leaves enforce gates red and operators with conflicting doc surfaces.

codebase_analysis_gaps: OpenAiService cites GPT-3.5-turbo-instruct; production default is gpt-4o-mini (README, package.json)
Pipeline section omits account-category mappings as DEC-0001 step 1
Missing CategoryMappingService, WordMappingService, AutoCategorizationService detail vs README
